what: Display project card in the projects list
why: Let the user see project details and select a project to activate the contextual sidebar

success_handling.criteria: User clicks a project card to select it

decisions.rationale: User stays on /projects page; sidebar appears with context, giving them control of when to navigate to Vaults/Sessions
Projects are displayed in a responsive 1→2 column grid so multiple projects are visible at a glance without long scrolling
